From: Migration lead
To: BI

Monthly order-count tie-out, CRM vs the warehouse, May. Both sides count distinct orders
with status not in (test, cancelled), calendar-May by order date UTC, same grain —
definitions were mapped and signed off in April (doc on file). Tolerance pinned by
Finance on 2026-05-02, BEFORE any results: abs 50 orders / rel 0.1% per region and total.

By region (CRM / warehouse):
AMER: 41,210 / 41,206
EMEA: 28,944 / 28,944
APAC: 17,002 / 17,011

The APAC gap of 9: CRM cut-off runs at 23:00 UTC, warehouse at 24:00 — the 9 orders are
in the 23:00-24:00 window and appear in CRM's June count (June 1 spot-check attached,
shows exactly those 9 order IDs).
